## Repair Codia's Mainline

1. In the **next comment**, in the top right, select the **three dot menu**. Choose the **Edit** option.
1. Reorder entries in the list to fix the history.
1. Save the comment.
1. Wait a moment for Mona to provide feedback.

<details>
<summary>Having trouble? 🤷</summary><br/>

> 💡 **Tip:** The commit IDs seem to represent years and months. Try ordering them by time. 🧐 ⏳

</details>
